requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — JS / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——JS / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——JS / IEC 62133

summary.en: Jordan's standards system (JSMO) adopts international IEC and regional GSO (GCC Standardization Organization) standards as national Jordanian standards (JS). For portable lithium cells and battery packs, the applicable safety basis is IEC 62133-2 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems), adopted as the relevant JS / GSO IEC 62133 standard. Where the product falls within a JSMO-regulated category, a conformity certificate demonstrating compliance against the applicable JS/IEC 62133 standard is required for import and sale. Testing covers abuse conditions (overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, impact, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical limits. JSMO conformity is typically demonstrated through type testing by an accredited laboratory and a conformity certificate issued under the JSMO conformity-assessment framework; IEC test reports under the IECEE CB Scheme are commonly accepted as supporting evidence toward the JS/IEC 62133 requirement.
summary.zh: 约旦标准体系（JSMO）将国际IEC标准及区域GSO（海湾标准化组织）标准采纳为约旦国家标准（JS）。对于便携式锂电芯及电池组，适用的安全基础是IEC 62133-2（便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求——第2部分：锂系统），并被采纳为相关的JS / GSO IEC 62133标准。当产品属于JSMO受监管类别时，进口和销售须取得证明符合适用JS/IEC 62133标准的符合性证书。测试涵盖滥用条件（过充、外部短路、挤压、撞击、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学限值。JSMO符合性通常通过认可实验室的型式测试和依JSMO合格评定框架签发的符合性证书来证明；IECEE CB体系下的IEC测试报告通常被接受为满足JS/IEC 62133要求的支持证据。
summary.zht: 約旦標準體系（JSMO）將國際IEC標準及區域GSO（海灣標準化組織）標準採納為約旦國家標準（JS）。對於便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，適用的安全基礎是IEC 62133-2（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求——第2部分：鋰系統），並被採納為相關的JS / GSO IEC 62133標準。當產品屬於JSMO受監管類別時，進口和銷售須取得證明符合適用JS/IEC 62133標準的符合性證書。測試涵蓋濫用條件（過充、外部短路、擠壓、撞擊、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學限值。JSMO符合性通常通過認可實驗室的型式測試和依JSMO合格評定框架簽發的符合性證書來證明；IECEE CB體系下的IEC測試報告通常被接受為滿足JS/IEC 62133要求的支持證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems (adopted as the applicable JS / GSO IEC 62133 standard in Jordan)
JSMO conformity-assessment framework — type testing plus conformity certificate for regulated products
IECEE CB Scheme — IEC test report commonly accepted as supporting evidence for JS/IEC 62133 conformity

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment) and GB 18287 (lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A GB 31241 report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory addresses the Chinese domestic requirement; it is not automatically a JSMO conformity certificate. However, because Jordan adopts IEC 62133, an exporter holding an IEC 62133-2 CB report (rather than only a GB 31241 report) is closer to the Jordan requirement, since the IEC report can support the JS/IEC 62133 conformity route.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）和GB 18287（手机用锂离子电池）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241报告满足中国国内要求，但不自动等同于JSMO符合性证书。然而，由于约旦采纳IEC 62133，持有IEC 62133-2 CB报告（而非仅GB 31241报告）的出口商更接近约旦要求，因为IEC报告可支持JS/IEC 62133符合性路径。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）和GB 18287（手機用鋰離子電池）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241報告滿足中國國內要求，但不自動等同於JSMO符合性證書。然而，由於約旦採納IEC 62133，持有IEC 62133-2 CB報告（而非僅GB 31241報告）的出口商更接近約旦要求，因為IEC報告可支持JS/IEC 62133符合性路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: The Jordan safety requirement is built on IEC 62133-2 (adopted as JS/GSO), whereas China relies on GB 31241, which is derived from but deviates from IEC 62133-2. Key gaps for a China-to-Jordan exporter: (1) a GB 31241 report alone does not constitute JSMO conformity — a JS/IEC 62133 conformity certificate is needed where the product is regulated; (2) the practical, lower-cost path is to obtain an IEC 62133-2 test report under the IECEE CB Scheme, which is widely accepted toward the Jordanian conformity certificate; (3) labelling/markings must follow Jordan/Arabic consumer-information expectations rather than Chinese-language GB markings. Unlike the EU, there is no additional CE-style multi-directive technical file — the Jordan focus is the JSMO conformity certificate against the adopted IEC standard.
gap.zh: 约旦安全要求以IEC 62133-2（被采纳为JS/GSO）为基础，而中国依据源自但偏离IEC 62133-2的GB 31241。中国对约旦出口商的主要差距：（1）仅凭GB 31241报告不构成JSMO符合性——产品受监管时须取得JS/IEC 62133符合性证书；（2）实际且成本较低的路径是取得IECEE CB体系下的IEC 62133-2测试报告，该报告被广泛接受用于约旦符合性证书；（3）标签/标识须遵循约旦/阿拉伯语消费者信息要求，而非中文GB标识。与欧盟不同，约旦没有额外的CE式多指令技术文件——约旦重点是依采纳的IEC标准取得JSMO符合性证书。
gap.zht: 約旦安全要求以IEC 62133-2（被採納為JS/GSO）為基礎，而中國依據源自但偏離IEC 62133-2的GB 31241。中國對約旦出口商的主要差距：（1）僅憑GB 31241報告不構成JSMO符合性——產品受監管時須取得JS/IEC 62133符合性證書；（2）實際且成本較低的路徑是取得IECEE CB體系下的IEC 62133-2測試報告，該報告被廣泛接受用於約旦符合性證書；（3）標籤/標識須遵循約旦/阿拉伯語消費者資訊要求，而非中文GB標識。與歐盟不同，約旦沒有額外的CE式多指令技術文件——約旦重點是依採納的IEC標準取得JSMO符合性證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where regulated — products in a JSMO-regulated category require a conformity certificate against the applicable JS/IEC 62133 standard before import and sale; an IECEE CB IEC 62133-2 report is commonly accepted as supporting evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Jordan bases portable lithium cell/pack safety on IEC 62133-2 adopted as a JS/GSO standard, demonstrated via a JSMO conformity certificate for regulated products. A Chinese GB 31241 report does not by itself satisfy this; the practical route is an IECEE CB IEC 62133-2 test report supporting the Jordanian conformity certificate. Exporters should confirm whether their specific product is in a JSMO-regulated category and prepare IEC-based test evidence plus Arabic consumer labelling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 约旦的便携式锂电芯/电池组安全以采纳为JS/GSO标准的IEC 62133-2为基础，受监管产品通过JSMO符合性证书证明。中国GB 31241报告本身不能满足此要求；实际路径是以IECEE CB IEC 62133-2测试报告支持约旦符合性证书。出口商应确认其具体产品是否属于JSMO受监管类别，并准备基于IEC的测试证据及阿拉伯语消费者标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 約旦的便攜式鋰電芯/電池組安全以採納為JS/GSO標準的IEC 62133-2為基礎，受監管產品通過JSMO符合性證書證明。中國GB 31241報告本身不能滿足此要求；實際路徑是以IECEE CB IEC 62133-2測試報告支持約旦符合性證書。出口商應確認其具體產品是否屬於JSMO受監管類別，並準備基於IEC的測試證據及阿拉伯語消費者標籤。
